message:
chore: add beads for GH #44 and #45, update tracker, rename wa -> ft in diagnostics string

New beads ft-nrvmu (GH #45: vendored feature forwarding) and ft-tlqut
(GH #44: vendored compatibility hardening), both in_progress.

Updated beads for wa-1igc, wa-1lc2, wa-29cb with current metadata.

main.rs: Fix recommendation string from "rebuild wa" to "rebuild ft"
reflecting the wezterm_automata -> frankenterm rename.
